notes: Benchmark registry for offline adapter checks and future paired baseline-versus-tuned controller runs.

benchmarks.description: Held-out deterministic early-phase next-action benchmark for adapter contract checks.
selection_notes: Validation split only
A/B grade only
Deterministic follow-up target required
Balanced across validate_profile, register_profile, evaluate_candidate, inspect_artifact

benchmarks.description: Held-out deterministic follow-up benchmark refreshed from v4 replay and migrated to the active pathless handle contract.
selection_notes: Same 16 example_ids as offline-forced-val16-v1
Rows refreshed from v4 split build after replay handle enrichment
Active scoring uses candidate_name/profile_ref instead of model-facing path fields
Used for compact-v2 offline follow-up contract checks

benchmarks.description: Held-out opening-step scaffold benchmark for first-action prepare_profile with mode=scaffold_from_seed and candidate_name-based local draft handling.
selection_notes: Validation and test split rows only
A/B grade only
Step == 1
First tool prepare_profile
Required mode scaffold_from_seed
Active scoring uses candidate_name grounding, not destination_path

benchmarks.description: Non-holdout opening-step field-grounding benchmark with compact-v2 opening-grounding handles for instruments and candidate_name-based local draft grounding.
selection_notes: Built from non-holdout opening_scaffold_train_v2_narrow and opening_scaffold_val_v2_narrow rows
Step == 1
Exactly one prepare_profile scaffold_from_seed action
Carries opening_grounding prompt-state block with starter instruments and candidate_name hint
Scores concrete instrument grounding and candidate_name grounding in addition to contract validity
Forbidden synthetic instrument values such as ALL count as failures
